arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea are among the clubs in the picture for Club Brugge’s Joel Ordóñez. Last month, we covered claims from Ecuador which stated Chelsea had sent a scout to watch the defender in action for the Jupiler Pro League side. There’s also been claims about Liverpool looking at him.
